data.title: Azithromycin Reduction to Reach Elimination of Trachoma B
data.brief_summary: The investigators propose a randomized controlled trial of discontinuation versus continuation of annual mass azithromycin distribution in hypoendemic communities of Maniema, DRC. The investigators will randomize communities with up to 20% Trachomatous Inflammation - Follicular (TF) prevalence following at least 5 years of mass azithromycin distribution to discontinuation or continuation of 3 additional years of annual mass azithromycin distribution.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Provision of appropriate informed consent
* Stated willingness to comply with all study procedures
* Live in one of the 80 communities with up to 20% prevalence of TF selected for the trial

Exclusion Criteria:

* Does not consent to participation
* Unwilling to comply with al
endpoints: Ocular chlamydia measured in a population-based sample of 0-9 year-old children

data.title: Azithromycin Reduction to Reach Elimination of Trachoma
data.brief_summary: The investigators propose a randomized controlled trial of discontinuation versus continuation of annual mass azithromycin distribution in hypoendemic communities of Maradi, Niger. The investigators will randomize communities with up to 20% Trachomatous Inflammation - Follicular (TF) prevalence following at least 5 years of mass azithromycin distribution to discontinuation or continuation of 3 additional years of annual mass azithromycin distribution.
